acceptance_targets: [CH06_BOOKER_01] Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:305 shows one concrete action or consequence tied to June that changes how the pact lands at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:317; fail if June still appears only through Leela's thoughts while the chapter closes on Omar and Leela's 'smaller truth' without a fresh price.

[CH06_CRAFT_01] Pass if each major exchange in the revised second scene anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:239, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:279 either introduces new information, changes the pact, or triggers a concrete consequence; fail if two adjacent exchanges still restate Mohit's generalized manipulation without altering the situation.

[CH06_PROSE_01] Pass if, after revision of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:127, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:177, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:277, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303, no more than two still rely on the short negation-correction emphasis pattern; fail if three or more retain the same cadence.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:305 shows one concrete action or consequence tied to June that changes how the pact lands at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:317; fail if June still appears only through Leela's thoughts while the chapter closes on Omar and Leela's 'smaller truth' without a fresh price.
findings.problem: The chapter gives Leela and Omar the emotional payoff of a usable alliance before June's injury exerts any fresh live pressure, so consequence is redistributed away from the person most harmed. June remains an imagined absence rather than an active source of cost, which softens the end beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:163, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:277, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:305, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:317 so the closing pact is interrupted or complicated by a concrete consequence tied to June: a failed call, a seen text, a refusal to answer, or another socially legible cost. Preserve the partial-alliance outcome, but make the chapter pay for it on the page instead of only remembering June abstractly.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each major exchange in the revised second scene anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:239, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:279 either introduces new information, changes the pact, or triggers a concrete consequence; fail if two adjacent exchanges still restate Mohit's generalized manipulation without altering the situation.
findings.problem: After the buffet confession clicks into place, the walk-home scene keeps rephrasing the same diagnosis of Mohit's method in polished institutional language. The chapter still sounds controlled, but leverage stalls because several exchanges paraphrase the same insight instead of producing new pressure, which reads as scene-level timidity by analysis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or repurpose one of the thematic loops at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:257. Use the recovered space to add a sharper disagreement, a new actionable disclosure, or a decision with immediate social cost before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:279 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303. Keep the strategic-versus-weather debate once; later beats should change the alliance terms rather than restate the thesis.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:127, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:177, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:277, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303, no more than two still rely on the short negation-correction emphasis pattern; fail if three or more retain the same cadence.
findings.problem: The chapter overuses a negation-correction sentence shape as a default emphasis device ('Not X', 'Not because'). By the third and later appearances, the rhythm stops feeling chosen and starts reading like an autopilot tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite at least half of the affected passages around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:127, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:177, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:277, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303 with different sentence architectures such as direct assertion, subordinate clause, image-led beat, or longer syntactic accumulation so emphasis comes from variation rather than the same negation pivot.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
